name: Marshmallow Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk and chocolate together in a heavy saucepan over low heat until the chocolate is melted.
2. Add sugar, salt, and corn syrup. Cook until boiling starts.
3. Cover and boil for 3 minutes to wash down any sugar crystals from the pan sides.
4. Uncover and cook without stirring until a thermometer reaches 232 degrees.
5. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm without stirring.
6. Add vanilla and beat until the fudge thickens and loses its gloss.
7. Cut each marshmallow into 8 pieces and stir into the fudge.
8. Turn the mixture into a greased pan and cut into squares when firm.
